meaning: n.身份低微之老妇,媪,糖果adj.感伤的,<俗>伪善的int.<俗>好呀!
examples: Oh, goody; I hope she'll let me come.
We want no goody-goody piety; we have too much of it.
Roger rolls his eyes. “Dude, you're such a goody-goody.
Goody had children Bobby, five, and Freddie, four, with former boyfriend and TV presenter Jeff Brazier.
Goody has continued to appear on television and speak to the press throughout her treatment.
